creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Your log has several -

> Shared object "libboost_system.so.1.65.1" not found...

Do you have boost 1.65 installed or the newer 1.66 that was just committed - even though bug #223922 still has reports blocking it?

Do your boost library links, such as lib/libboost_system.so still point to the older boost instead of the newer installed version?

Does your env have LD_LIBRARY_PATH set? is it right?
